title: wedelia montana
intro: Wedelia montana, also known as mountain joyweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Wedelia montana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
